pullRequest.title: DOM-54500 Removing connection check in hybrid with shared credentials

nodes.body: It might be good to add a unit/integration test here with `ProxyPingBody` mocked to throw an error to ensure Ping is not called in this case to detect regressions.
Additionally, it could be informative to add a comment as to why this combination is checked and its relation to the control plane.
We should avoid using `object` as type, if the type is not defined it should be enough by defining the minimum set of attributes it should have
